name: Pork with Sweet Potatoes and Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from chops and brown well in a heavy skillet. Lay on paper towels to drain.
2. In a shallow casserole dish, arrange the pineapple rings.
3. Place the pork chops on top of the pineapple.
4. Cover with sweet potatoes.
5. Heat the pineapple juice to boiling.
6. Stir in brown sugar, cornstarch, and salt until the syrup is clear and thickened.
7. Add water and margarine to the hot syrup.
8. Pour over the casserole.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. During the last 15 minutes, uncover and complete cooking.
